lemmas.primary_translation: bunker (ship's fuel / defense structure / golf hazard)

definitions.translation: space for fuel on a ship

definitions.text: helt eller delvis nedgravd forsvarsverk, beskyttelsesrom eller ammunisjonslager (av betong eller lignende)
definitions.translation: fortified partially buried defense structure, shelter, or ammunition depot (made of concrete)

definitions.text: sandgrop på golfbane som tjener som hinder
definitions.translation: sand trap on a golf course serving as an obstacle
